title: PM MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
description: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh to micro/small business entities.
benefits: Loan categories: Shishu (up to ₹50k), Kishore (₹50k-5L), Tarun (₹5L-10L).

title: PMEGP (Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme)
description: Credit-linked subsidy scheme for setting up new micro-enterprises.
benefits: Subsidy of 15% to 35% on project costs up to ₹50 lakh.

title: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Facilitating bank loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for greenfield enterprises.
benefits: Loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for starting a business.

title: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
description: Comprehensive support for artisans and craftspeople.
benefits: Skill training, ₹15,000 toolkit grant, and collateral-free credit support.

title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
description: Guarantee cover for collateral-free credit facilities to MSEs.
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹2 crore for small businesses.

title: MSME Champion Scheme
description: Integrated scheme for MSME development including digital and design support.
benefits: Subsidies for innovation, digitisation, and sustainable manufacturing.

title: SFURTI (Cluster Development)
description: Organizing traditional industries and artisans into clusters.
benefits: Financial assistance for common facility centers and marketing.

title: Startup India Seed Fund
description: Financial assistance to startups for proof of concept and prototype development.
benefits: Grants up to ₹20 lakh and debt/convertible debentures up to ₹50 lakh.

title: PM Formalization of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME)
description: Support for micro food processing units to formalize and upgrade.
benefits: Credit-linked subsidy of 35% on project costs up to ₹10 lakh.

title: ASPIRE Scheme
description: Promotion of innovation, rural industry, and entrepreneurship.
benefits: Setting up of Livelihood Business Incubators (LBIs).

title: ZED Certification Scheme
description: Certification for MSMEs to adopt Zero Defect Zero Effect practices.
benefits: Financial assistance for certification and training.

title: NSIC Marketing Assistance
description: Assisting MSMEs in marketing their products and services.
benefits: Support for exhibitions, buyer-seller meets, and online portals.

title: CLCSS (Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme)
description: Facilitating technology upgradation by providing upfront capital subsidy.
benefits: 15% capital subsidy for induction of well-established technology.

title: One District One Product (ODOP)
description: Identifying and promoting a unique product from each district.
benefits: Market linkages and branding support for local products.

title: Self Employment Lending (National Corporations)
description: Term loans for SC/ST/OBC/Handicapped to start small businesses.
benefits: Low-interest loans with repayment periods up to 10 years.

title: Chief Minister’s Self Employment Generation Programme (CMEGP)
description: Generating employment in rural and urban areas through micro-enterprises.
benefits: Subsidy of up to 35% on project costs up to ₹25 lakh.

title: Udyogini (Women Welfare)
description: Assisting women to start micro-businesses with loan subsidies.
benefits: Subsidy of 30% for general and 33.3% for SC/ST women.

title: KMDC Self-Employment Loan
description: Economic individual development loan for minority community members.
benefits: Loan up to ₹2 lakh with 50% subsidy for starting a business.

title: Dr. Ambedkar Development Corporation Self-Employment Scheme
description: Direct lending and bank tied-up loans for SC entrepreneurs.
benefits: Zero-interest/Low-interest loans and subsidies for enterprises.

title: Vishwakarma Communities Development Loan
description: Support for traditional artisans from Vishwakarma communities.
benefits: Loan up to ₹2 lakh for purchase of modern tools and raw materials.

title: KSTDC Tourist Taxi Scheme
description: Financial assistance for unemployed youth to purchase tourist taxis.
benefits: Subsidy of up to ₹3 lakh on purchase of a tourist vehicle.

title: Unnati Scheme (Social Startups)
description: Supporting startups that address social issues through innovation.
benefits: Grant of up to ₹50 lakh for SC/ST entrepreneurs.

title: Badavara Bandhu (Mobile Bank)
description: Interest-free loans for street vendors to escape money lenders.
benefits: Daily interest-free loans of ₹10,000 for small business capital.

title: Devaraj Urs Backward Classes Development Direct Loan
description: Self-employment loans for individuals from backward classes.
benefits: Loans up to ₹1 lakh with 20-30% back-end subsidy.

title: Karnataka Handloom Development Corporation (KHDC) Support
description: Assistance to handloom weavers for modernization and marketing.
benefits: Provision of modern looms and yarn at subsidized rates.

title: Cauvery Handicrafts (KSHDCL) Artisan Kits
description: Modern toolkits and training for handicraft artisans.
benefits: Free modern tools and opportunity to sell in Cauvery emporiums.

title: Elevate (Startup Karnataka)
description: Flagship grant-in-aid scheme for startups across various sectors.
benefits: Grants ranging from ₹5 lakh up to ₹50 lakh for selected startups.

title: Kayaka Scheme (SHG Support)
description: Empowering women SHGs to start productive enterprises.
benefits: Zero-interest loans up to ₹5 lakh for SHGs.

title: Rural Artisan Direct Loan
description: Financial assistance for rural artisans to start small workshops.
benefits: Loan of ₹50,000 for purchase of tools and raw materials.

title: Karnataka Leather Industries (LIDKAR) Support
description: Assisting footwear and leather goods makers in the state.
benefits: Modern machinery and branding support for leather products.
